tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows poor glycemic control (elevated HbA1c and fasting glucose), dyslipidemia (high total cholesterol, LDL, and triglycerides), and mild metabolic acidosis (low CO₂). Renal function and electrolytes are within normal limits, and there is no evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend optimization of diabetes and lipid management, and further evaluation of acid-base status if clinically indicated.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
